query: SELECT ap.id, ap.employeeId, ap.dataDesligamento, ap.dataInicio, ap.dataFim, ap.tipo, ap.status, e.nome as empNome FROM aviso_previo ap LEFT JOIN employees e ON ap.employeeId = e.id WHERE ap.status = 'em_andamento' ORDER BY ap.dataFim ASC LIMIT 10
